relations.note: Selects the specific approved gradient required when a masthead contains the LISRAYA logo mark.
The logo-specific masthead gradient also follows the horizontal dark/saturated-to-light direction.

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves
Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves
Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds
Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Keep gradient applications within the approved brand palette and assigned background roles.
rules.rule_text: Use only the approved gradient set; never invent gradients. The set comprises Brand Blue → Dark Navy, Sky Blue → Deep Blue, Sunshine → 75% Gold, Golden Sand → White → Light Blue, Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine, and Sunshine → light gold. Apply them only to their listed roles: dark or blue backgrounds and waves, warm backgrounds, soft light backgrounds, or warm light-to-saturated backgrounds. Approved gradients may be used as backgrounds and in combination with the wave graphic.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Maintain the approved directional progression of masthead and banner gradients.
rules.rule_text: In masthead and banner applications, gradients run horizontally from left to right, with the dark or saturated end on the left and the light end on the right.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

rules.intent: Preserve logo contrast and the approved masthead lockup treatment.
rules.rule_text: When the LISRAYA logo mark appears in a masthead, pair it with the approved Sunshine → light gold gradient (#faa31b → approximately #ffe05c) and place the mark at the gradient’s lightest end for contrast.
